title: be going to (do)
desc: 계획된 의도 또는 근거 있는 예측
examples: Good morning, healthy sleep. Did you sleep good? Let's get you changed. Now it's the first change of the day because who wants a dirty diaper? We make sure that he is safely on his changing table and we have all of our supplies. It's great in our drawer here. We have our wipes and our diapers. So let's get him changed. We are all changed and now we're going to make breakfast. We like to make some pancakes so he can get some practice. Weston goes into his high chair so we're going to put him down and buckle him in. After breakfast, we like to go for a morning walk to get some sun. We have our stroller, my coffee and of course Weston and our dog. We're off for a nice stroll around the neighborhood. And that is my morning routine with a seven month old. But because he's so young, it changes every day so we just roll with it.

A nighttime routine with a seven month old can vary sometimes. But for tonight, our nighttime routine is starting with some dinner. We are practicing our salad foods. I am using an avocado and doing little slices for him so he can practice eating. We just give it to him so it's kind of like baby wide wing. Grab it. Yay. Good bite. After dinner, we like to take our bath because he gets extra messy to clean with his food. We have his towel and his washcloth ready to go. We're going to go get his st. tug and get him in the bath.
